subject: Aggron, a large bipedal armored dinosaur-like Pokemon with steel-plated body and prominent horns
description: Aggron stands in a powerful forward-leaning stance in what appears to be a rocky underground or cave environment. The body is heavily armored with dark steel-plated segments across the torso, back, and limbs. Two large forward-pointing horns protrude from the head. The coloring is predominantly dark grey-black with lighter grey plating accents. The background suggests broken rock and earth tones, consistent with tunnel excavation. The creature's posture is aggressive and grounded.
foreground: Aggron in aggressive stance, steel-plated body, prominent horns
background: rocky cave, broken stone, earth tones
